title: Wire production cron tick for v2 Scheduler + HitL timeouts
description:
The v2 Scheduler (fireDueSchedules) and HitL checkpoint timeouts (processTimeouts) only run when invoked. Without a cron/worker tick, schedules never fire and checkpoints never time out in production. Implement a Next.js route or external cron that calls both on an interval (e.g. every 30s-60s).

## Context
From docs/product/agentutils-v2-migration-plan.md rollout checklist. lib/v2/scheduler.ts and lib/v2/hitl.ts have the engines; they need an invoker.
acceptance_criteria: fireDueSchedules() and processTimeouts() run on an interval in production. Tests cover the tick endpoint (auth, dedupe, idempotency).

title: Fix Firebase config fetch failure on Google sign-up
description: Google sign-up fails because the client cannot fetch Firebase configuration, causing auth initialization to abort with a 500 response and preventing sign-in.

title: Reposition homepage to side-effect safety narrative
Add approval and DLQ dashboard tabs
Implement hybrid subscription + usage overage pricing
description: Implement the pricing plan from PRICING_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md: 4 tiers (free/builder/pro/enterprise), monthly quotas, overage billing, Stripe integration, billing API routes, and dashboard updates.

title: Add /docs/v2 in-app documentation page
description:
No human-facing docs for the v2 API. Add /docs/v2 covering tenant signup, agent registration, and the 5 tools with copy-pasteable curl examples.

## Context
From migration plan §5.
acceptance_criteria: /docs/v2 renders with working examples for every v2 endpoint.

title: Publish v2 OpenAPI spec + llms.txt quick-start
description:
v2 /v1/* endpoints are not yet in public/openapi.json or public/llms.txt. Agents cannot discover the v2 surface. Add v2 paths to OpenAPI (separate x-agentutils-v2 section or openapi-v2.json) and a v2 quick-start to llms.txt / llms-full.txt.

## Context
From migration plan §5. Related to au-utu (out-of-sync v1 specs) — resolve that first so v2 docs don't inherit phantom endpoints.
acceptance_criteria: public/openapi.json and public/llms.txt cover all v2 endpoints. Validated with a linter.

title: Fix pre-existing failing tests: out-of-sync openapi/llms specs + missing routes (shield/otp/kv/form/webhook/notify/audit)
Add image upload tool (B2-backed) with /api/upload and /api/file-host routes
Fix 404 on /tools — footer 'Tools' link leads to dead page
description:
## 🐛 [HIGH] Bug: /tools page returns 404

**Product:** AgentUtils (agent-utils.com)
**URL:** https://agent-utils.com/tools

### Steps to reproduce
1. Navigate to https://agent-utils.com (homepage)
2. Scroll to footer
3. Click 'Tools' link under 'AGENT UTILS' section
4. Observe 404 error page

### Expected
The /tools route should either:
- (a) Render an index page listing all available tools (DLQ, Checkpoint, etc.), OR
- (b) Redirect to /tools/dlq (the first/primary tool)

### Actual
404: This page could not be found.

### Root cause
No `/tools` route exists in the Next.js app. Individual tool pages exist:
- `/tools/dlq` → works ✓
- `/tools/checkpoint` → works ✓
- `/tools` → **missing** (no page.tsx or redirect)

The footer 'Tools' link in both footer variants points to `/tools`.

### Evidence
- Page title: '404: This page could not be found.'
- No JS errors in console (Next.js default 404)
- Footer link href: `https://agent-utils.com/tools`
- Sub-pages /tools/dlq and /tools/checkpoint load correctly

### Fix options (for Wing-Zero)
1. **Preferred:** Create `app/tools/page.tsx` — index page listing all tools with links
2. **Quick fix:** Add `app/tools/page.tsx` with `redirect('/tools/dlq')`
3. **Alternative:** Update footer link to point to `/tools/dlq` instead of `/tools`
